page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmhfg6.20xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. It features 80 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, resulting in 80 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 4.8 GB of RAM per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor.

This server type does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage options. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The lack of integrated local storage and GPU accelerators represents a tradeoff, positioning this instance primarily for workloads reliant on raw CPU execution and network-attached storage.

Given its dedicated physical core allocation and high-frequency Intel Xeon processor, the ecs.ebmhfg6.20xlarge offers high resource density for compute-heavy tasks. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring predictable, non-shared CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. Appropriate workloads include high-performance computing, intensive web serving, batch processing, and application servers that require dedicated CPU execution.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmhfg6.20xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance featuring 80 physical cores and 80 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 3.1 GHz. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it provides 384.0 GB of RAM, translating to 4.8 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. With its 1:1 physical-core-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this server is designed for workloads requiring consistent, high-performance compute resources. It is well-suited for high-performance computing, batch processing, and large-scale application hosting where multi-threaded virtualization overhead must be minimized.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmhfg6.20xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server featuring 80 physical cores, an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor at 3.1 GHz, 384 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for high-compute workloads.
